CREATE TABLE test_map (id Int32, key1 String, value1 Int32, key2 String, value2 Int32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT map(key1, value1) FROM test_map WHERE id = 1;
SELECT map(key2, value2) FROM test_map WHERE id = 2;
SELECT map(key1, value1, key2, value2) FROM test_map WHERE id = 3;
SELECT map('key1', number, 'key2', number * 2) FROM numbers(5);
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num Int32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_numbers SELECT number FROM numbers(10);
SELECT map('key' || toString(num), num * 10) FROM test_numbers;
SELECT map(key, value) FROM (SELECT key1 AS key, value1 AS value FROM test_map UNION ALL SELECT key2 AS key, value2 AS value FROM test_map);
SELECT map('number' || toString(num), num) FROM numbers(3) AS n LEFT JOIN test_map AS t ON n.num = t.id;
SELECT map(k, v) FROM (SELECT key1 AS k, value1 AS v FROM test_map WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_map WHERE value1 < 5));
